cpu_memory_data.notes: tRPC metrics.currentStats endpoint returns HTTP 200 (previously broken). Returns cpuPercent:null due to no metrics-server in minikube — environment limitation, not code bug. Header shows 0%, node table shows — (correct null display). Fix verified.
cpu_memory_data.evidence: GET /trpc/metrics.currentStats returns 200 with {cpuPercent:null, memoryPercent:null, cpuCores:null, memoryBytes:null, podCount:0}

favicon.notes: favicon.ico returns HTTP 200. Link tags show image/x-icon type. No console errors. Previously returned 500.

health_nav_link.notes: /system-health now renders frontend Health page with 'System Healthy' UI and 'API status: ok'. Previously returned raw JSON from backend route.
health_nav_link.evidence: Navigate to /system-health => shows React page with heading 'System Health', body 'System Healthy', API status: ok

settings_token_list.notes: Settings > API Tokens tab shows 23 existing tokens, paginated (1-10 of 23), Revoke buttons working, Create Token form present, MCP snippet available.
settings_token_list.evidence: Settings /settings API Tokens tab shows EXISTING TOKENS (23) with list and Generate Token button

env_blocked: metrics-server not installed in minikube — CPU%/Mem% data null by environment
